'''Dalton''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Engager]]'', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

==Biography==
Dalton suffered an injury during a trap laid by [[Brion Peck]], resulting in a nasty scar on his face, something he considered a grave reminder of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. He refused to have the scar medically healed until Peck and his commandos were either killed or captured.<ref name="CO" />

He led the ''Engager'' during its mission to [[Rafft]] to crush the rebel cell on the planet.<ref name="CO" />
